summary: purge-non-algebra complete. BEFORE/AFTER: 21,500 → 17,161 lines (-4,339). 115 → 105 files (-10). 343 → 266 vitest tests (-77). 54 node-runner tests pass (37 have path breakage from test/ → tests/node-runner/ move — pre-existing, not purge-related).
keyDecisions: DELIBERATE TEST KILLS: 5 test files deleted that were alive and passing. distributed-dag.test.ts, llm-feedback.test.ts, spec-conformance.test.ts, checkpoint-integration.test.ts, agent-dispatch/agent-integration.test.ts. These tested capabilities roadmap shouldn't own (cross-repo DAG merge, LLM feedback loops, spec-conformance validation, checkpoint/recovery runtime, agent dispatch integration). Philosophical decision: roadmap is graph algebra + runtime, not a platform. Do not restore these tests.

UNHARVESTED CAPABILITIES: intent-gate-enrichment had spec-to-validator synthesis (auto-generating shell validators from spec scenarios). protocol-distributed had cross-repo bottleneck detection (pattern mining across multi-repo DAG state). Both deleted without archiving. If a future chain needs this, rebuild from requirements — don't excavate git history.

CHAIN MAP: This is chain 0 (purge) of a 10-chain convergence plan: 0-purge → 1-foundation → 2-extract-core → 3-compose-engine → 4-policy-surface → 5-agent-protocol → 6-nodespec-split → 7-validation-engine → 8-observability → 9-publication. The successor agent is executing chain 1 of 10, not improvising.

DONJON COORDINATION: Chain 6 (NodeSpec split) requires a coordinated switch with donjon. Donjon's surface is clean (3 public imports), but the define<PipelineNode>({...}) call will need a fullNode() compat wrapper. Flag early — not a surprise at chain 6.
gotchas: CHAIN 1 SCOPE (foundation): Typed accessors (nodes(g), node(g, id) replacing raw g.nodes access). Unified completion (3 completion modules → 1). consumeArtifact() enforcement (runtime check that consumes are satisfied before node execution begins). These are mechanical deduplication tasks that unblock chain 2 (extract core). Do not get ambitious — chain 1 is deduplication, not architecture.
